overview:
## Discussion

The activity’s name is used to group the activity within test output in Xcode test reports.

For activities created with the [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTContext] [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTContext/runActivityNamed:block:] class method, the [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTActivity/name] property will match the `name` parameter passed to the class method.

# name

**Instance Property**

A human-readable name for the activity.

## Declaration

```swift
var name: String { get }
```

## Discussion

The activity’s name is used to group the activity within test output in Xcode test reports.

For activities created with the [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTContext] [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTContext/runActivityNamed:block:] class method, the [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTActivity/name] property will match the `name` parameter passed to the class method.
title: name
